---
pagetitle: "Open Science Initiative in Statistics"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}
<div>
    <h2 class="mb-0" style="border-bottom: none;">
        <span class="fw-bold">LMU</span>
        <span class="fw-light"> Open Science Initiative in Statistics</span>
    </h2>
</div>
<div class="container px-0 mb-4">
    <div class="row align-items-center">
        <div class="col-md-9 p-0">
            <p style="line-height: 1.6; text-align: justify;" class="m-0">
                    Founded in June 2021, the LMU Open Science Initiative in Statistics (OSIS) at the Department of Statistics 
                    supports the goals of the OSC and wants to take on a leading role in fostering good research practices 
                    and promoting open science. The department believes that statistics as a subject plays a major role in 
                    solving the reproducibility crisis and in working towards better, open research.
                    <br><br>
                    The Department of Statistics is involved in the development and application of statistical and machine learning 
                    methods. Statistical consulting and teaching are at the core of the department's activities.
            </p>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3 text-center">
            <img src="images/osis.png" class="img-fluid" style="max-height:150px;" alt="OSIS logo">
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="container px-0 mb-4">
    <h4 class="mb-2" style="border-bottom: none; color: var(--osc-accent);">
        Members
    </h4>
    <ul class="mt-0 osc-init-organizer-list">
        <li>
            <a href="/people/people/andreas-bender.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">
                Dr. Andreas Bender
            </a>
        </li>
        <li>
            <a href="/people/people/moritz-herrmann.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">
                Dr. Moritz Herrmann
            </a>
        </li>
        <li>
            <a href="/people/people/matthias-assenmacher.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">
                Dr. Matthias Assenmacher
            </a>
        </li>
        <li>
            <a href="/people/people/lisa-wimmer.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">
                Lisa Wimmer
            </a>
        </li>
        <li>
            <a href="/people/people/patrick-oliver-schenk.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">
                Patrick Oliver Schenk
            </a>
        </li>
        <li>
            <a href="/people/people/felix-henninger.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">
                Felix Henninger
            </a>
            
        </li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="container px-0">
    <h4 class="mb-2" style="border-bottom: none; color: var(--osc-accent);">
        Get Involved
    </h4>
    <p style="line-height: 1.6;" class="mb-3">
        Core members of the OSIS currently meet once a month. If you are a member of the Department of Statistics 
        and are interested in joining the initiative, do not hesitate to contact us.
    </p>
    <div class="d-flex gap-3 align-items-center flex-wrap justify-content-center mt-3">
        <a href="mailto:osis@stat.uni-muenchen.de" class="btn btn-primary osc-init-contact-btn">
            <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Contact OSIS team
        </a>
        <a href="https://www.stat.lmu.de/en/osis/" class="btn btn-outline-primary osc-init-contact-btn" rel="noopener">
            <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Learn More
        </a>
    </div>
</div>
```
